title: Section 19
content: 1[19. Punishment for harbouring, etc.--Whoever voluntarily harbours or conceals, or attempts to harbour or conceal any person knowing that such person is a terrorist shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term which shall not be less than three years but which may extend to imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine: Provided that this section shall not apply to any case in which the harbour or concealment is by the spouse of the offender.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 7, ibid., for Chapter IV (w.e.f. 21-9-2004).
